name: Tasman Resources Ltd
analysis: TAS has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.0592. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.0602 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.0592, stop A$0.0406, target A$0.0640. Risk/reward is 0.26:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
